caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, headphones, and a black hoodie with the words "BOSS HUSTLE" printed on the chest sits in a studio setting. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone mounted on a black boom arm, speaking while looking slightly to his left. Behind him is a white backdrop featuring a logo with stars and the text "UNCOR HUSTLE." To his right, a blue sign reads "Where BOSSES Talk!" and a black mug sits on the desk with red and white text that says "BOSS TALK ONE ON ONE." A small red and white logo that says "BOSS TALK" is overlaid in the bottom left corner of the scene. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, continuing to speak with slight movements of his head and mouth, while the camera angle and environment remain static.
